nasb.text: ‘This is the law when a man dies in a tent: everyone who comes into the tent and everyone who is in the tent shall be unclean for seven days.

esv.text: “This is the law when someone dies in a tent: everyone who comes into the tent and everyone who is in the tent shall be unclean seven days.

cnv.text: “如果人在會幕裡死了，條例是這樣的：進這會幕的和一切在會幕裡的，都必不潔淨七天。

ccb.text: 若有人死在帐篷里，当时走进帐篷的或在场的人都七天不洁净。
